phase_statuses.title: Decompose backend training-compliance service
phase_statuses.objective: Split validation, serialization, query, and mutation responsibilities out of the monolithic backend service while keeping `TrainingComplianceService` as the stable facade.

acceptance_criteria.text: `TrainingComplianceService` no longer directly owns all validation helpers, row serialization, query composition, and mutation orchestration in one file.
existing router behavior and cross-module training authorization flows remain unchanged.
training requirement, record, certification, and authorization logic still fails fast on invalid or missing prerequisites.

phase_statuses.notes: - Backend training-compliance service was decomposed into support and repository helpers with focused API regression coverage preserved.

phase_statuses.title: Decompose frontend training-compliance page and hook
phase_statuses.objective: Split the page shell and hook into smaller, focused units for user lookup, form wiring, and tab-panel rendering without changing current page behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: `TrainingComplianceManagement.js` no longer mixes page shell, local copy/config, reusable lookup widget, and both record/certification panel render trees in one file.
`useTrainingCompliancePage.js` no longer directly owns all duplicated user-search effect logic and page-form orchestration in one file.
current page interactions, test ids, and query-param prefills remain stable after extraction.

phase_statuses.notes: - Frontend training-compliance page and hook were decomposed into helpers, a reusable user-search hook, style tokens, and section components without changing page contracts.

phase_statuses.title: Focused regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded refactor preserved both backend and frontend training-compliance behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused backend and frontend training-compliance tests pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and any bounded residual risk.

phase_statuses.notes: - Focused backend and frontend regression commands passed and the tranche evidence was recorded in execution-log.md and test-report.md.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构：以培训合规模块为下一轮 tranche，拆分后端 training_compliance 服务与前端 TrainingCompliance 页面/Hook，保持行为稳定并补齐验证。
